zh.La Haye-Pesnel, Manche, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪曼其拉 海也-培斯爾
zh.La Haye-Pesnel, Avranches, Manche, Basse: 法國諾門迪曼其拉 海也-培斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville於大約1250年出生在法國諾門迪曼其拉 海也-培斯爾時，他的父親Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax36歲，母親Janne Philippa de COURCY23歲。他和Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1295年之後在法國諾門迪曼其哈白。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville于大约1250年出生在法国諾門迪曼其拉 海也-培斯爾时，他的父亲Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax36岁，母亲Janne Philippa de COURCY23岁。他和Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1295年之后在法国諾門迪曼其哈白。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: PAYNEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville was born about 1250, in La Haye-Pesnel, Manche, Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax, was 36 and his mother, Janne Philippa de COURCY, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon. He died after 1295, in Hambye, Manche, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville est né environ 1250, à La Haye-Pesnel, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Janne Philippa de COURCY, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon. Il est décédé après 1295, à Hambye, Manche, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville um 1250 in La Haye-Pesnel, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax 36 und seine Mutter Janne Philippa de COURCY 23. Er hatte mit Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1295 in Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville è nato il circa 1250 nel La Haye-Pesnel, Manche, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Janne Philippa de COURCY, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon. Morì dopo il 1295, nel Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia.

ja.Hambye, Manche, Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディマンチェハンブイ
ja.La Haye-Pesnel, Manche, Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディマンチェラ ヘイエ-ペスネル

ja.lifeSummary: Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricquevilleが約1250年にフランスノーマンディマンチェラ ヘイエ-ペスネルで生まれた時，父Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Draxは36歳，母Janne Philippa de COURCYは23歳であった。彼はJeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1295年以後にフランスノーマンディマンチェハンブイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville(이)가 대략 1250년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 라 헤예-페스넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Janne Philippa de COURCY(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 이후 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 햄비에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em La Haye-Pesnel, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Janne Philippa de COURCY, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon. Ele faleceu após 1295, em Hambye, Manche, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville родился около 1250 г. в местности ла хеие-песнель, манч, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Janne Philippa de COURCY, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon. Он умер после 1295 г. в местности хамби, манч, норманди, Франция.

sm.Abt 1250–after 1295: e tusa o le 1250–ina ua ma'ea le 1295

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Foulques IV de PAYNEL seigneur de Fumechon, Bréhal et Bricqueville nació aproximadamente 1250, en La Haye-Pesnel, Manche, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume IV de PAYNEL Baron de Hambye seigneur de Bréhal et Drax, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Janne Philippa de COURCY, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Jeanne de BIGARS Heiress de Furnechon. Murió después de 1295, en Hambye, Manche, Normandie, Francia.
